title: SimplePrefix
description: SimplePrefix is a well-structured and optimized Prefix Plugin
body:
# SimplePrefix

SimplePrefix is a modern, minimalistic Minecraft plugin for managing and displaying player prefixes and groups with **LuckPerms** integration. It focuses on clean YAML configuration, fast iteration (auto-reload), and reliable tab/nametag handling using scoreboard teams.

---

## Features

- **LuckPerms Integration** ‚Äì Seamless synchronization with LuckPerms groups.
- **Team Management** ‚Äì Scoreboard teams for tab list and nametags with priorities.
- **Prefix, Suffix & Name Color** ‚Äì Full control per group.
- **Chat & Tab Format** ‚Äì Custom formats with placeholders.
- **Auto-Reload** ‚Äì Reload config files automatically without server restart.
- **LuckPrefix Migration** ‚Äì Easy migration with automatic conversion.
- **Lightweight** ‚Äì Minimal performance impact and simple to maintain.
- **Straightforward Configuration** ‚Äì Simple `groups.yml` + `config.yml` setup.

---

## Requirements

- Paper or Spigot server (1.8+)
- LuckPerms
- Java 8+

---

## Installation

1. Download SimplePrefix.
2. Place the `SimplePrefix-<version>.jar` file into your server‚Äôs `plugins` directory.
3. Start (or restart) your server once.
4. Configure `groups.yml` and `config.yml`.
5. Apply changes with `/sp reload` (or let auto-reload handle it).

---

## Configuration

SimplePrefix uses a `groups.yml` file for group definitions and a `config.yml` for general settings + formatting.

### Example `groups.yml`

```yaml
groups:
  admin:
    prefix: "<red>[Admin] "
    suffix: ""
    priority: 100

  mod:
    prefix: "<aqua>[Mod] "
    suffix: ""
    priority: 90

  vip:
    prefix: "<yellow>[VIP] "
    suffix: ""
    priority: 50

  default:
    prefix: "<gray>[Player]"
    suffix: ""
    priority: 0
```

### Example `config.yml`

```yaml
settings:
  auto-reload:
    enabled: true
    interval: 30
  join-delay: 20
  team-prefix: "lp_"
  debug: false

# Chat & Tab Formatierung
chat-format:
  enabled: true
  format: "{prefix}{player}{suffix}: {message}"

tab-format:
  enabled: true
  format: "{prefix}{player}"
```

---

## Commands & Permissions

Main command: `/sp`

### Basic

- `/sp help` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.use`  
  Shows all available commands.
- `/sp reload` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.reload`  
  Reloads all configuration files.
- `/sp update [player]` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.update`  
  Updates teams (all players or a single player).
- `/sp list` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.list`  
  Shows all configured groups.

### Group management

- `/sp create <group> <prefix>` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.create`
- `/sp set <group> prefix <value>` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.set`
- `/sp set <group> suffix <value>` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.set`
- `/sp set <group> priority <0-999>` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.set`
- `/sp set <group> namecolor <color>` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.set`
- `/sp clear <group> prefix|suffix|namecolor` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.set`
- `/sp delete <group>` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.delete`
- `/sp save <group>` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.save`

### Format management

- `/sp format chat` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.format`
- `/sp format chat set <format>` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.format`
- `/sp format chat toggle` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.format`
- `/sp format tab` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.format`
- `/sp format tab set <format>` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.format`
- `/sp format tab toggle` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.format`

### Migration & maintenance

- `/sp migrate luckprefix` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.migrate`  
  Migrates all data from LuckPrefix.
- `/sp cleanup` ‚Äî `simpleprefix.cleanup`  
  Automatically removes empty groups.

---

## Placeholders

Use these in `chat-format.format` and `tab-format.format`:

- `{prefix}`: Replaced with the group prefix.
- `{suffix}`: Replaced with the group suffix.
- `{player}`: The player's name (without color).
- `{message}`: The player's chat message (chat format only).

---

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/AstranoxDEV/simpleprefix
